title: Piercing
alt: Some lava around the piercing site is normal, but keep an eye out for spreading earthquakes and eruptive activity that might indicate rifting.
transcript:
[One large panel, overlaid by two smaller ones in the corners, shows the Earth with an upward opening curve through its crust and mantle.]

Small panel 1: [Arrow pointing to a machine on tracks with an arm and a tube into the ground, with Cueball, Megan, and Ponytail nearby] Directional drilling rig

[Label on curve in the main panel]: Constant curvature borehole

Small panel 2: [Earth with a ring embedded onto it]

[Caption below the panel:]
Good news: Geologists have decided that Earth is finally old enough to get its first lithosphere piercing!
explanation:
The comic shows a  rig which will drill a hole through the  to create a  with a constant curvature. Normally, this could be for scientific study, or something functional like creating a well or installing a heat exchanger. In this case, though, the comic suggests that the borehole is being created so that the Earth can be fitted with a piercing like a giant ring. In many societies, piercings in humans are subject to age restrictions or recommendations; it appears that in the world of the comic, the same is true of planets, as it states that the Earth is now old enough to go ahead with this procedure. If so, then Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, and Neptune are probably also old enough , unless there is a different age requirement for gas giants.

The caption may draw on the idea of dating the  using geologic evidence. However, rather than determining the age with greater , the fictional geologists have determined that the age falls into a certain developmental stage, as of a human life. In the real world, the  does divide the Earth's history into units such as eons and eras. These may sound comparable to stages or years of one's life, but are defined by properties of the —not by developmental milestones that all planets would be expected to go through. (The histories of other celestial bodies, like Mercury, Venus, Mars, and the Moon, are divided into different eras, based on unique geologic events that occurred on each.)

The title text plays on the normal warnings about piercings, replacing inflammation around the piercing with lava, and signs of infection such as pus, widening holes, or swelling with earthquakes and eruptions.
